name: signal-harvester
description: Automated demand-discovery pipeline. Harvests pain-point signals from Reddit and other sources, triages via multi-LLM evaluation, forecasts product opportunities, and self-evolves based on outcomes.
standalone_features: Reddit pain-point harvesting with regex + targeted search
Multi-LLM tiered triage (Mistral 7B → Qwen 14B → Claude API)
Creative product forecasting (pattern, silence, adjacent, upstream, automate)
Autonomy scoring for hands-off product viability
Non-software product support (physical, service chains, hybrid)

features: Build tracking linked to project milestones
enhancements.description: Approved harvest signals generate project entries with tasks.

features: Future: client contacts from shipped products
enhancements.description: Revenue contacts from shipped products flow into CRM.
